description: Exact tolerances for PRSG-011 mirrored migration guidance.

migration_guidance.row_count.rationale: Both paths must preserve the same runtime guidance rows.

migration_guidance.commands.rationale: FR-026 and FR-028 command strings are operator-facing product contracts.

tier2_matrix.action.rationale: Suggestion versus suppression behavior must not differ across paths.

tier2_matrix.reason.rationale: Skip and no-op reasons are part of the operator contract.

no_auto_run_guard.forbidden.rationale: Scaffold and autopilot must never auto-run Tier-2 relocation.
